name: ripple
description: Agent video editing: transcription-driven cuts, frame-sheet eyes, HDR-safe finishing, deterministic QA, and a persistent taste memory (VIDEO.md). Routes motion graphics to HyperFrames or Remotion.

interface.shortDescription: Give agents eyes and ears for video editing
interface.longDescription: Ripple gives Codex an evidence-driven workflow for editing real footage. It pairs professional editing playbooks with a local CLI for transcription, perception indexes, cut-point analysis, timeline and frame sheets, rendering, localized repair, deterministic QA, and NLE handoff. VIDEO.md preserves standing creative direction and edit.json records every cut decision with its reasoning.
defaultPrompt: Edit this footage into a concise video and verify every cut.
Repair this mistimed scene without rebuilding the rest of the edit.
Inspect this render for cut, color, and audio problems.
